The '''GBp-625 hyperdrive''' was a hyperdrive unit produced by [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]]. It was installed in the first 'A' model of the [[Helix-class light interceptor]] built by Arakyd. Other than hyperdrive performance specifications and minor configuration options, the GBp-625 was virtually identical to the [[GBp-629 hyperdrive]].

*<!-- 1995-02-XX -->{{JournalCite|5|A Buyer's Guide to Alternative Starships}}
